trivia_bullets.text: Modern Horizons 3 (set code MH3, released 2024-06-14) is a format-spanning direct-to-Modern set that revisits mechanics from Magic's full history. MH3 has no single-plane identity — its cards draw on characters, planes, and mechanics from across the game's timeline. [Scryfall API]

Mindless Conscription is a {2}{B} uncommon enchantment that amasses Zombies 3 on entry and again whenever you draw your third card in a turn — rewarding draw-heavy black builds with a snowballing Zombie Army token. Amass Zombies (as opposed to amass Orcs, introduced in LTR) specifies the Army token subtype as Zombie. EDHREC rank 12,603 places it in modest but non-negligible Commander territory. [Scryfall]

The draw-third-card trigger pairs naturally with blue card draw but belongs to a black-only card — rewarding a Dimir (blue-black) shell in MH3 Limited, which leans toward draw-matters themes. The card has no flavor text. [Scryfall]

Illustrated by Warren Mahy, a New Zealand-based artist known for highly atmospheric MTG landscapes and creature portraits across many sets including Zendikar, Innistrad, and Theros blocks. [Scryfall; WebSearch snippet via scryfall.com/card/mh3/101]

related_cards.note: Early amass card — different token subtype (Orcs in LTR, Zombies here); predecessor mechanic

related_cards.name: Drawn from Dreams
related_cards.note: Draw-matters black/blue card; same shell target for Mindless Conscription's draw trigger

related_cards.name: Army of the Damned
related_cards.note: Classic Zombie-mass-summoning enchantment; thematic ancestor of zombie-army mechanics

related_cards.name: Cryptbreaker
related_cards.note: Zombie synergy draw engine; relevant to the draw-third-card shell
